AI-Driven Invoice Financing: Accelerate Your Cash Flow Today

Unlock 80-100% of your invoice value immediately with smart invoice financing for commercial trades and civil contractors. No more waiting 30-90 days for payment - get paid now and keep projects flowing.

Get Instant Quote Invoice Calculator
✓ 24-Hour Setup ✓ 80-100% Advance Rates

How Invoice Financing Transforms Your Cash Flow

❌ Without Invoice Financing

Day 1

Complete $50,000 commercial project

Day 7

Invoice sent to commercial client

Day 30

Payroll due but no payment received

Day 60

Suppliers demanding payment

Day 90

Finally receive client payment

✅ With Invoice Financing

Day 1

Complete $50,000 commercial project

Day 2

Upload invoice - receive $45,000 immediately

Day 3

Pay crews and suppliers on time

Day 5

Start next project with capital available

Day 90

Client pays - you receive remaining $5,000

Invoices We Finance for Commercial Trades

🏗️

Civil & Construction Invoices

  • Earthmoving and excavation projects
  • Road construction and infrastructure
  • Commercial building projects
  • Government and council contracts
  • Mining and resources work
Advance Rate: 85-95%
⚡

Trade Services Invoices

  • Electrical installation and maintenance
  • Plumbing and gas fitting services
  • HVAC system installation
  • Commercial fit-out work
  • Industrial maintenance services
Advance Rate: 80-90%
🚛

Transport & Logistics

  • Freight and transportation services
  • Equipment hire and rental
  • Waste management services
  • Delivery and courier services
  • Fleet maintenance and repairs
Advance Rate: 80-85%
🛠️

Professional Services

  • Engineering and consulting
  • Project management services
  • Technical and IT services
  • Design and architectural work
  • Specialist consulting services
Advance Rate: 85-100%

AI-Powered Invoice Financing Platform

🤖

Smart Credit Assessment

Our AI analyzes your customers' payment patterns, creditworthiness, and industry risk factors for instant approval decisions.

📊

Cash Flow Optimization

Intelligent algorithms predict optimal financing timing and amounts to maximize your working capital efficiency.

⚡

Instant Processing

Upload invoices via mobile app and receive funds within hours through automated verification and approval systems.

🎯

Risk Management

Advanced predictive analytics minimize bad debt risk while maximizing your available financing capacity.

Invoice Financing Solutions

Selective Invoice Finance

Most Popular

Advance Rate: 80-95%

Fees: 0.5-2.0% per month

Setup: 24-48 hours

Minimum: $10,000 per invoice

Key Features:

  • Choose which invoices to finance
  • No minimum monthly volume
  • Maintain customer relationships
  • Confidential financing available
Best For: Established trades wanting flexibility and control over which invoices to finance.

Whole Ledger Finance

Advance Rate: 85-95%

Fees: 0.4-1.5% per month

Setup: 3-5 days

Minimum: $50,000 monthly sales

Key Features:

  • Finance entire sales ledger
  • Comprehensive credit protection
  • Sales ledger management
  • Lower overall costs
Best For: High-volume businesses wanting comprehensive solutions and lower costs.

Bad Debt Protection

Advance Rate: 90-100%

Fees: 0.8-2.5% per month

Setup: 5-7 days

Protection: Up to 90% of bad debts

Key Features:

  • Insurance against non-payment
  • Higher advance rates
  • Peace of mind protection
  • Focus on growth not collections
Best For: Businesses working with new customers or in higher-risk industries.

Simple 3-Step Process

1

Upload & Verify

Upload approved invoices via our secure mobile app or web portal. Our AI instantly verifies invoice authenticity and customer creditworthiness.

⏱️ 5 minutes
2

Instant Approval

Receive immediate approval decision based on our AI credit assessment. Get pre-approved limits for your regular customers for even faster processing.

⏱️ 10 minutes
3

Get Paid Now

Funds transferred directly to your business account within hours. Use the cash immediately for payroll, suppliers, and new opportunities.

⏱️ Same day

Transform Your Business with Invoice Financing

Immediate Cash Flow

Convert outstanding invoices to cash within 24 hours. Never wait 30-90 days for payment again - keep your business operating smoothly.

Growth Acceleration

Take on larger projects and more customers without cash flow constraints. Scale your business rapidly with continuous working capital.

Supplier Relationships

Pay suppliers early for volume discounts and preferred terms. Build stronger partnerships through reliable, timely payments.

Team Retention

Never miss payroll or delay contractor payments. Maintain your skilled workforce and build reputation as a reliable employer.

Competitive Advantage

Bid on larger projects with confidence knowing you have working capital backing. Win more work with faster project turnaround capability.

Business Resilience

Weather economic uncertainties and seasonal fluctuations with steady cash flow. Build a stronger, more stable business foundation.

Industries We Serve

Our invoice financing is specifically designed for commercial trades and contractors who invoice business and government clients:

✅ Civil Contractors

Earthmoving, road construction, infrastructure development, mining services, and large-scale civil projects.

✅ Commercial Trades

Electrical, plumbing, HVAC, mechanical, and specialized trade contractors serving commercial clients.

✅ Industrial Services

Manufacturing support, industrial maintenance, equipment servicing, and technical support services.

❌ Not Suitable For

Residential builders, retail businesses, hospitality, or B2C service providers due to different payment patterns and risk profiles.

Stop Waiting for Payment - Get Paid Today

Join hundreds of commercial trades and civil contractors who've transformed their cash flow with our AI-powered invoice financing platform.
